name: Metropolis
description: 8-stage Ryk M-185-inspired pitch and gate sequencer. Per-stage slider pitch, pulse count 1-8, gate mode (hold/repeat/single/rest), ratcheting, slide, skip. 30 scales, 9 direction modes, TB-303 slide, dual AUX CV inputs.

controls.name: PITCH Sliders (1-8)
controls.description: Sets quantized pitch for each stage. LED reflects current gate state during playback.
controls.detail: Quantized to active SCALE · range set by CONFIG → OCT (1-3 octaves)

controls.name: PULSE COUNT Sliders (1-8)
controls.description: Sets how many clock pulses each stage holds before advancing.
controls.detail: Range 1-8 · interacts with GATE MODE and STEP/DIV

controls.name: GATE MODE Switches (1-8)
controls.description: 4-position: HOLD, REPEAT, SINGLE, or REST.
controls.detail: HOLD: gate tied for all pulses · REPEAT: gate per STEP/DIV subdivision · SINGLE: one gate at start · REST: silent

controls.name: SLIDE / SKIP Buttons (1-8)
controls.description: Single click toggles pitch glide into the stage; double click toggles skip; hold+encoder sets ratchet count 1-4.
controls.detail: Solid green=slide · blinking green=skip · button-combo shortcuts trigger menu actions

controls.name: GATE TIME
controls.description: Sets gate length from short click to full pulse width. Summed with AUX if assigned to G.LEn.
controls.detail: CCW: shortest · CW: longest · affects SINGLE and REPEAT modes

controls.name: SLIDE TIME
controls.description: Sets portamento time for stages with SLIDE enabled. Constant-time like TB-303 regardless of pitch interval.
controls.detail: CCW: ~0 s · CW: ~1 s

controls.name: DATA Encoder
controls.description: Turn to adjust values, click to confirm or enter submenus.
controls.detail: Most menus are one level deep · click returns to main display

controls.name: EXIT Button
controls.description: Returns to default sequencer display immediately.
controls.detail: Escapes any menu without committing uncommitted selections

controls.name: RUN
controls.description: Starts or stops the sequence.
controls.detail: State preserved on power-down if saved

controls.name: RESET
controls.description: Resets sequence to stage 1 per CONFIG → rST mode.
controls.detail: rST_n: next clock · rST_F: on clock-aligned RST · rST_r: RESET input functions as RUN gate

controls.name: PREV
controls.description: Running: stays on current stage. Stopped: scrolls stages backward to preview pitches.
controls.detail: Hold+encoder for fine scrub

controls.name: NEXT
controls.description: Running: jumps one stage ahead. Stopped: scrolls forward to preview.
controls.detail: Useful for skipping to drop point live

controls.name: BPM
controls.description: Sets internal clock tempo 20-320 BPM. Tap tempo supported.
controls.detail: Click to enter menu, tap to set, encoder adjusts · BPM lock available

controls.name: SWING
controls.description: Shuffle amount applied to odd clock pulses (INT CLK only).
controls.detail: 50 = 0% swing · 72 = 33% swing

controls.name: INT/EXT
controls.description: Selects clock source: internal, external trigger, or DIN Sync 24 PPQ.
controls.detail: C_InT · C_EXT · C_d24 (requires reset pin 5 of DIN-Sync)

controls.name: DIV
controls.description: Sets incoming clock division (di) and outgoing CLK division (do). Allowed values set by CONFIG → d.
controls.detail: di: 1-64 · do: ALL/Odd/Even or per-stage pulse (d_STA)

controls.name: MODE
controls.description: Direction mode: Forward, Reverse, Ping-Pong, Brownian, Random, plus Fixed variants where STAGES counts pulses instead of stages.
controls.detail: Frd · rEv · PnG · brn · rnd · plus -F fixed-length variants

controls.name: STAGES
controls.description: Sets sequence length in stages (or pulses in -F fixed modes).
controls.detail: 1-8 stages in default modes

controls.name: STEP/DIV
controls.description: Subdivides the pulse for REPEAT gate mode.
controls.detail: STEP1-STEP4 · STEP4 means gate fires every 4th clock pulse

controls.name: SCALE
controls.description: Selects quantization scale. 30 scales from chromatic through modes to microtonal.
controls.detail: Includes Bhairav, Pelog, Hirojoshi, Prometheus, Enigmatic, and more

controls.name: ROOT
controls.description: Sets root note of the current scale. No effect when scale is Chromatic.
controls.detail: 12 chromatic root positions

controls.name: SAVE
controls.description: Saves full panel state to one of 8 EEPROM slots. Last saved slot recalls on power-up.
controls.detail: 8 slots · encoder to choose, click to commit

controls.name: LOAD
controls.description: Recalls a saved settings slot.
controls.detail: 8 slots

controls.name: MODE Button (black)
controls.description: Holds for mode shortcut assignments via SLIDE/SKIP buttons.
controls.detail: Configured via CONFIG → ModES

controls.name: CONFIG
controls.description: Opens system submenu: OCT, d, SYn, rST, rPC, ScAlE, ModES, b, TunE, CALib, Vr.
controls.detail: All global settings live here including AUX calibration

controls.name: AUX A Button
controls.description: Assigns AUX A destination: G.LEn (gate length), STAGE (length), STEPd, d.In (clock div), rATch, P.PrE (pitch pre-quantizer 1V/oct), P.PrEL (semitones pre), P.OCT (octave shift), P.PoST, P.PoSL, rooT (1V/oct root), rooTL (root semitones).
controls.detail: P.PrE and rooT require CALib first

controls.name: AUX B Button
controls.description: Assigns AUX B destination. Same list as AUX A.
controls.detail: Two independent AUX modulation paths

inputs.name: AUX A
inputs.description: ±5V CV input modulating the sequencer parameter assigned to AUX A

inputs.name: AUX B
inputs.description: ±5V CV input modulating the sequencer parameter assigned to AUX B

inputs.name: RESET
inputs.description: Gate (0-5V) resets sequence per CONFIG → rST mode. Can function as RUN gate in rST_r

inputs.name: CLK
inputs.description: External clock input. Active only in C_EXT or C_d24 modes. Accepts 0-5V pulses or LFO

outputs.name: GATE
outputs.description: Gate output: 0V off, +5V on. Length set by GATE TIME and gate mode

outputs.name: SYNC
outputs.description: Pulse at first or last clock of sequence (CONFIG → SYn). Yellow LED indicates state

outputs.name: CLK
outputs.description: Internal clock out when INT CLK, or divided external clock when EXT. CONFIG → d_STA emits pulse per new stage instead

behaviors.name: Pulse Count x Gate Mode Matrix
behaviors.description: PULSE COUNT sets how long a stage stays active in clock pulses; GATE MODE sets what the gate does during that time. HOLD ties gates across pulses (legato), REPEAT fires a gate per STEP/DIV subdivision, SINGLE fires once, REST silences. Massive rhythmic variety per stage.

behaviors.name: TB-303 Constant-Time Slide
behaviors.trigger: SLIDE button enabled on a stage
behaviors.description: When a stage has slide active, PITCH output glides from previous pitch to current over SLIDE TIME — constant time regardless of interval size. Signature acid-bassline feel. Works in parallel with gate events.

behaviors.name: Ratcheting
behaviors.description: Per stage, ratchet value 1-4 subdivides each pulse into that many gates (half the GATE TIME each). Combines with PULSE COUNT and STEP/DIV to produce rolling, machine-gun fills. Clear all ratchets with EXIT+encoder until r_Clr.

behaviors.name: Skip as Pattern Editor
behaviors.description: Skipped stages are bypassed entirely and don't count toward STAGES length. Create odd-meter patterns (5, 7 active stages) without changing STAGES. Blinking LED = skipped.

behaviors.name: AUX Pitch Pre vs Post Quantizer
behaviors.description: P.PrE (1V/oct) or P.PrEL (semitone) shift pitch BEFORE the quantizer — so CV pushes notes to different scale degrees (voice leading). P.PoST / P.PoSL add offset AFTER quantizer — moves whole sequence chromatically. Two totally different musical effects.

behaviors.name: AUX Root/Scale Transpose
behaviors.description: Shifts scale root while keeping slider positions. rooT is 1V/oct-calibrated (chord-root sequencer drives modulation); rooTL is ±12 semitones. Use to auto-harmonize sequence around a chord progression from a second sequencer.

behaviors.name: 30 Scales
behaviors.description: Chromatic, Major, minor, modes, blues, pentatonics, harmonic/melodic minors, Japanese/Gypsy/Arabic modes, Pelog, Tritone, Prometheus, Augmented, Enigmatic. Scale plus ROOT instantly reharmonizes sliders without manual note-picking.

behaviors.name: Brownian Direction
behaviors.description: Drunken walk: 50% forward, 25% stay, 25% back. Combined with scale quantize and small slider range, produces evolving melodies that trend forward but meander. Fixed variant (brn-F) locks total pulse count.

behaviors.name: Reset Mode Variants
behaviors.description: rST_n resets on next clock (DAW-style start). rST_F requires RESET to be high simultaneously with CLK (prevents glitch resets from noisy gates). rST_r makes RESET input a RUN gate — sequence only plays while gate is high.

behaviors.name: DIN-Sync Mode
behaviors.description: Expects 24 PPQ clock on CLK and uses RESET input as a run/stop signal per Roland DIN-Sync spec. Lets Metropolis slave to vintage 808/909/303 setups with a DIN-Sync adapter cable.

behaviors.name: CLK Output Per-Stage Mode
behaviors.description: CLK output emits a pulse at the start of each new stage instead of dividing the clock. Perfect for driving a second sequencer that advances once per Metropolis stage — hierarchical stepping.

behaviors.name: Tuning Mode
behaviors.description: Pitch output locks at 0V, gate stays high. Use to tune a connected VCO's base pitch without running the sequence.

behaviors.name: Rest Pitch Behavior
behaviors.description: rPC_Y: PITCH output updates even on REST stages. rPC_n: PITCH holds previous value during rest. rPC_Y is classic TB-303 feel where rests still change pitch silently; rPC_n keeps the last note ringing in connected delays/reverbs.

patchIdeas.name: Acid 303 bassline
patchIdeas.patch: MODE=Frd · SCALE=Minor · slides on stages 2, 5, 7 · PULSE COUNT mostly 1, one stage at 2 for a tied note · GATE MODE mostly SINGLE · one REST · short GATE TIME · quick SLIDE TIME · route PITCH to VCO, GATE to envelope, envelope to resonant LPF · signature acid squelch
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis:
* MODE=Frd · SCALE=Minor · SLIDE on S2,S5,S7
* PULSE mostly 1 · one REST · GATE=SINGLE

- Metropolis (PITCH) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Metropolis (GATE) g> Envelope (Trig)
- VCO (Out) -> LPF (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> LPF (Cutoff)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- LPF (Out) -> VCA (In) // 303 acid slide bass

patchIdeas.name: Polyrhythmic ratchet snare fill
patchIdeas.patch: Main voice uses PITCH+GATE · separate ratchet snare driven by AUX A assigned to rATch · program ratchets 4 on stages 4 and 8 · snare trigger comes from GATE · each 4th/8th stage becomes a 4-gate machine-gun roll while the pitch line continues normally
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis:
* Ratchet=4 on S4,S8 · AUX A=rATch

- Metropolis (PITCH) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Metropolis (GATE) t> Snare (Trig)
- Metropolis (GATE) g> Envelope (Trig)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV) // machine-gun fills S4/S8

patchIdeas.name: Brownian generative lead
patchIdeas.patch: MODE=brn · SCALE=Minor Pentatonic · STAGES=8 · short GATE TIME · AUX A → P.OCT driven by slow random S&H · every few bars the sequence jumps an octave randomly · pairs with long reverb on the lead voice for ambient evolution
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis:
* MODE=brn · SCALE=PEnT-
* AUX A=P.OCT

- S&H (Out) >> Metropolis (AUX A)
- Slow Clock (Out) t> S&H (Trig)
- Metropolis (PITCH) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Metropolis (GATE) g> Envelope (Trig)
- VCO (Out) -> Reverb (In) // brownian + octave randomizer

patchIdeas.name: Chord progression via AUX root shift
patchIdeas.patch: Second sequencer (or quantized CV source) outputs chord roots as 1V/oct · calibrate Metropolis AUX (CONFIG → CALib) · AUX A → rooT · Metropolis slider pattern stays fixed but entire scale retunes to each new root · instant diatonic progressions
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis:
* CALib done · AUX A=rooT · SCALE=Major

- Chord Sequencer (CV) p> Metropolis (AUX A)
- Metropolis (PITCH) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Metropolis (GATE) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In) // root-follows-chord

patchIdeas.name: Polymetric kick driven by stage clock
patchIdeas.patch: CONFIG → d → d_STA so CLK output pulses once per new stage · STAGES=5 · standard 4/4 kick pattern clocks main sequence · CLK output fires kick drum · kick plays on a 5-stage cycle against a 4/4 bass line · resolves every 20 steps
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis:
* STAGES=5 · d_STA enabled

- Master Clock (Out) c> Metropolis (CLK In)
- Metropolis (PITCH) p> Bass VCO (V/Oct)
- Metropolis (GATE) g> Bass Envelope (Trig)
- Metropolis (CLK Out) t> Kick (Trig) // kick on each new stage

patchIdeas.name: Dual Metropolis master-slave song structure
patchIdeas.patch: Metropolis #1: SYnL (sync on last stage) · main melodic sequence · SYNC output to CLK of Metropolis #2 in EXT mode · Metropolis #2 runs slow chord-root sequence · PITCH of #2 → AUX A of #1 (set to rooT) · 8-stage melody transposes every time it loops
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis #1:
* SYnL · AUX A=rooT
Metropolis #2:
* EXT CLK · 4 stages FRD

- Metropolis #1 (SYNC) c> Metropolis #2 (CLK)
- Metropolis #2 (PITCH) p> Metropolis #1 (AUX A)
- Metropolis #1 (PITCH) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Metropolis #1 (GATE) g> Envelope (Trig) // song-form chord progression

patchIdeas.name: Swing-heavy trap hat
patchIdeas.patch: SWING=68 (30% shuffle) · all stages PULSE=2 GATE=REPEAT STEP/DIV=STEP1 · some stages ratchet=3 for rolls · GATE to hi-hat trigger · classic trap hat syncopation with human-feel swing
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis:
* SWING=68 · PULSE=2 · REPEAT STEP1
* Ratchet 3 on S3,S7

- Metropolis (GATE) t> Hi-Hat (Trig)
- Metropolis (PITCH) >> Filter (Cutoff) // pitch CV modulates hat tuning

patchIdeas.name: Ping-pong arp with gate-time automation
patchIdeas.patch: MODE=PnG · SCALE=Major · 4 stages · AUX A=G.LEn driven by slow LFO · gates stretch and shorten over time · arp accelerates to sustained pads then back to plucks · dynamic performance without touching knobs
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis:
* MODE=PnG · STAGES=4 · AUX A=G.LEn

- Slow LFO (Out) >> Metropolis (AUX A)
- Metropolis (PITCH) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Metropolis (GATE) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In) // gate-length breathing

patchIdeas.name: Skip-driven odd meter
patchIdeas.patch: STAGES=8 · skip stages 3 and 6 (double-click SKIP/SLIDE) · 6 active stages · 4/4 clock but sequence is 6 beats long · instant 6/8 feel over 4/4 drums · swap skips on the fly for live meter changes
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis:
* STAGES=8 · S3,S6 skipped

- Metropolis (PITCH) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Metropolis (GATE) g> Envelope (Trig)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV) // 6-step cycle against 4/4

patchIdeas.name: DIN-sync to vintage drum machine
patchIdeas.patch: INT/EXT=C_d24 · TR-808 DIN-Sync output → DIN cable adapter → CLK (pin 1) and RESET (pin 5) · Metropolis runs locked to 808 transport · SYNC out can trigger a second polyphonic voice · keeps analog drum timing intact
patchIdeas.diagram:
Metropolis:
* INT/EXT=C_d24

- TR-808 (DIN Sync pin1) c> Metropolis (CLK)
- TR-808 (DIN Sync pin5) g> Metropolis (RESET)
- Metropolis (PITCH) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Metropolis (GATE) g> Envelope (Trig) // vintage DIN-Sync slave
